block_01: It is easy to get lost in the exciting world of trading, especially when you are just starting out. There are lots of things a trader should know. But don’t be afraid, as we will introduce you to the basic concepts of trading on the IQ Option platform right away.
block_02: Today, we are talking about three things: how to open the deal, how to predict the future price of the asset and, arguably the most important of them all, how not to lose all your money.
block_03: All three topics are crucial for beginners and will help you navigate the platform and grasp the essentials of trading much faster. Read the article to make your first steps!
